The My Meeting Room service offers a solution to enhance the organization’s collaboration and communication capabilities. This service is designed to streamline Meeting Rooms, improve productivity and create a seamless experience for both in-person and remote participants. With modern devices, technologies and integrated features, the service aims to transform your Meeting Rooms into modern, efficient and collaborative spaces.
The service assumes the use of a central management platform for a Meeting Room.

The My Meeting Room service aims to standardize and streamline your Meeting Room experience by focussing on key features such as high quality audio & video, seamless connectivity, interactive displays, wireless content sharing and room scheduling & management all while doing this in a way to ensure security and privacy.
The solution is designed to empower organizations with modern collaboration tools that foster innovation, efficiency and effective communication. By leveraging the aforementioned key features, our service transforms Meeting Rooms into hubs of productivity and creativity, whether participants are gathered in person or attending remotely.

Our Meeting Room service contains the following minimum set of devices and software:
Note that these functionalities are not always realized by separate devices as many of them can be combined into multipurpose devices (e.g. soundbar with built-in camera, all-in-one solution, etc.).

Cegeka aims to be vendor independent (A list of partner Vendors can be found in Section ‘Conditions’).
Through workshops – providing guidance to customers to find the ‘best-fit-for-purpose’ equipment, both from an operational as a budgetary point of view - a Hardware Product Catalogue is created, containing
for all hardware devices in a specific Meeting Room Type.
This Hardware Product Catalogue is reviewed and adapted based on AV vendor market evolution and agreed upon in mutual understanding.

We offer different support packages to suit our customers’ need throughout the lifecycle. These packages affect the following HWLCM service activities: | BRONZE | SILVER | GOLD | PLATINUM | | PER DEVICE | PER ROOM | PER ROOM | PER ROOM | | This support pack is activated by default on all meeting room hardware that is procured via Cegeka. This includes: 2 interventions in case of hardware issues call / response analysis / fix - identify the issue and propose solution | This support pack is our standard for the modern and “always-on” meeting room in a corporate environment and provides security from Cegeka and the manufacturer. This includes: 4 interventions per month in case of hardware issues call / response analysis / fix - identify the issue and propose solution Hardware exchange | This support pack is the zero-worry warranty to provide a complete unburdening for the customer. This includes: 4 interventions per month in case of hardware issues call / response analysis / fix - identify the issue and Hardware exchange On site engineer User adoption and training | This support pack is mainly aimed for mission critical rooms and executive board rooms. Tailormade for each and every meeting room. This includes: 4 interventions per month in case of hardware issues call / response analysis / fix - identify the issue and Express hardware exchange On site engineer User adoption and training Dedicated portal Proactive support Preventative maintenance visit Design & stats |

Responsibility Matrix below provides the appropriate RACI tags for Customer and Cegeka with respect to the activities for the Standard and Optional Services. | ACTIVITY | CEGEKA | CUSTOMER | | STANDARD SERVICES | | | | Software management | | | | Management of software | | | | Proactive monitoring | | | | L2/L3 remote Technical Incident handling | | | | Technical REMOTE L2/L3 incident handling | | | | Hardware Lifecycle management | | | | Cegeka refers to THE RACI TABLE OF ‘DEVICE LIFECYCLE MANAGEMENT SERVICES’ | | | | Platform Management | | | | Management of the Platform (configuration and analysis) | | | | Management Platforms | | | | Proactive monitoring | | | | Maintain & support functionality to create Meeting Room accounts | | | | Maintain & support the configured Compliance, Configuration and device restrictions Policies | | | | Management of software | | | | Always up-to-date | | | | Integrated security | | | | Management of Drivers/Firmware | | | | review and update of drivers/firmware | | | | Reporting | | | | Monthly reporting of active Meeting Rooms in scope | | | | OPTIONAL SERVICES | | | Physical Booking system | | | | Adds additional physical booking system to Meeting Room | | |
ACTIVITY CEGEKA CUSTOMER STANDARD SERVICES Software management Management of software Proactive monitoring L2/L3 remote Technical Incident handling Technical REMOTE L2/L3 incident handling Hardware Lifecycle management Cegeka refers to THE RACI TABLE OF ‘DEVICE LIFECYCLE MANAGEMENT SERVICES’ Platform Management Management of the Platform (configuration and analysis) Management Platforms Proactive monitoring Maintain & support functionality to create Meeting Room accounts Maintain & support the configured Compliance, Configuration and device restrictions Policies Management of software Always up-to-date Integrated security Management of Drivers/Firmware review and update of drivers/firmware Reporting Monthly reporting of active Meeting Rooms in scope OPTIONAL SERVICES Physical Booking system Adds additional physical booking system to Meeting Room = Responsible: Party responsible for performing the activity and/or achieve the task. One party is Responsible, although other Parties can be delegated to assist in the actual work if required. An Accountable must sign off (approve) on work that Responsible provides. Responsible is by default proactive. = Accountable: Party ultimately accountable for the correct and thorough completion of the task and/or activity as performed by Responsible. For each task and/or activity exactly one Accountable must be specified. Accountable has the mandate to accept/dismiss on work provided by Responsible. Accountable is by default reactive. = Consulted: Party to be consulted (whose opinions are sought in two-way communication) when performing tasks and/or activities. Consulted may also provide requirements on scope, result expectations, etc. Consulted is by default reactive. = Informed: Party to be informed / kept up-to-date on tasks and/or activities (just one-way communication). Informed often only on completion of the task and/or activity. Informed no formal role in realization and therefore by default reactive.

OPTIONAL SKUs My Teamwork – My Meeting Room –Physical Booking System Base fee for Physical Booking system Physical Booking System Measurement The monthly price of the Meeting Room service is based upon a Unit price (P) for following and the quantity of Meeting Rooms, Physical Booking System (Q). The corresponding Unit of Measurement is mentioned in Table above. Definition for central Meeting Room management platform and Meeting Room are mentioned in Section ‘Conditions’. Calculation [(software management per Meeting Room)*(Quantity of Meeting Rooms) + (HCLM Warranty Pack)*( Quantity of Meeting Rooms per Warranty Pack) + (Platform cost)]+[(management Physical Booking System)*(Quantity of Physical Booking Systems)]+ )]
